title: Unused feesResult can fail lint and hides an incomplete metric fetch
reasoning: fetchStats binds feesResult from Promise.allSettled but never reads it. In a project with an ESLint script, this is likely to be reported by the standard unused-variable rule, and it also leaves the accumulatedFees request with no behavioral effect despite the component paying the network cost for it.
reproduction: Run pnpm lint in frontend; the unused feesResult binding is expected to be flagged if the standard no-unused-vars rule is enabled by the Next ESLint config.
recommendation: Remove the accumulatedFees read if it is not needed, or incorporate feesResult into a displayed/derived statistic. If the request is intentionally reserved for later, avoid binding it until the value is used.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests or lint results were included for this feature, and there is no coverage checking that every fetched on-chain value contributes to rendered stats.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a lint/build check in CI for the frontend package, or add a focused test that verifies all live stats requests feed a rendered value when accumulated fees becomes part of the UI.
minimumFixScope: frontend/src/components/live-stats.tsx: remove or use feesResult and its associated accumulatedFees request.
